ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_query" TEXT /* Query or filter used to access the data */,
  "data_volume" INTEGER /* Amount of data accessed (in bytes) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the data access session (in seconds) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the data access (e.g., success, failure, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each access log entry
ID of the individual whose data was accessed
ID of the user accessing the data
Date when the data was accessed
Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit)
IP address of the user accessing the data
User agent string of the device used to access the data
Query or filter used to access the data
Duration of the data access session (in seconds)
Result of the data access (e.g., success, failure, error)
